{{CargoRelic
|name=Otter House
|class_id=20949
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Artificial habitat designed specially for otters, the structure and materials used were carefully selected to simulate otters' natural burrows. The space and the entrance cater to their behavior so that they can easily adapt to their new home.
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +5<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +8<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +8<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail DEF +8<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
